anti_claim: Provider context recipe budget fixtures validate copied source-module hashes plus context-shape metadata only; they do not call providers, prove goals, run Lean/Lake, expose proof or oracle bodies, authorize release, or claim private macro equivalence.

inputs.role: public provider-context recipe budget table matching the macro provider-context recipe ids and authority ceiling
source-backed public context section metadata with copied macro source refs, validator-checked anchors, byte budgets, and body redaction
exact copied macro source module manifest with source-to-target hashes and required anchors
Macro batch calibration report builder that aggregates reduced provider receipts into recipe-policy, leakage, row-patch-review, cost, and taxonomy reports without provider dispatch.
Macro compute-provider policy standard defining provider lanes, authority tiers, transform-job packets, provider receipts, draft row patches, and low-authority worker boundaries.
Macro formal problem ladder evaluator that consumes the provider-context harness into transform jobs, optional provider dispatch receipts, reduction, and recipe policy metrics.

Macro prover graph benchmark harness that defines provider context recipe ids, budget ceilings, bounded section fill, leakage audits, and std_transform_job compilation without provider dispatch in v0.
Macro provider adapter contract body for registry binding, model resolution, fallback policy, budget policy, receipt requirements, and runtime-refactor gates.
Macro provider navigation transform receipt standard that keeps provider-generated navigation candidates candidate-only and mutation-free.

Macro provider receipt reducer that classifies provider output, detects truth-side leakage, audits premise budgets, reviews row patches, and writes advisory evidence without provider calls or source promotion.

Macro std_transform_job standard body that defines the provider-context transform-job ABI: projection input packets, provider receipts, row patches, authority ceilings, and local-evidence override policy.
negative case: recipe exceeds bounded byte contract
negative case: truth-side or oracle-only section selected
negative case: proof body or oracle body field leakage
negative case: public fixture authorizes provider call
negative case: recipe emits wrong deliverable type for route
negative case: over-budget omitted-section manifest suppressed
negative case: synthetic section material without source refs or source anchors

purpose: Validate copied non-secret provider context source modules and public recipe budgets without calling providers, exposing proof bodies, or smuggling truth-side oracle material.

source_open_body_imports.reader_action: Validate with provider_context_recipe_budget_policy, then run microcosm workingness to count these imports in the source-open body floor.
